name: A 'Birthday Party'
description:
You were invited to the quiet girl's 22nd birthday, but there's something off about this birthday party…

✩

Karin, a classmate of yours. Your first year with her, you didn't even know she was your classmate. But she was always a quiet girl, minding her business, doing no wrong.

One random afternoon, Karin unexpectedly approached you and invited you to celebrate her birthday at her house.

-~✩~-
